## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds  
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (if tests exist for changed code)
- [ ] Tool descriptions updated (if tool behavior changed)
- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No new `any` types without comments
